name: Cevapcici (Yugoslavian Sausages)
recipeIngredient: 1 large yellow onion, peeled and grated
sweet paprika and a little cayenne
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients, except the olive oil, thoroughly in a large bowl.
2. Roll the mixture into small "cigars" about 1 inch by 3 inches.
3. Rub each sausage lightly with olive oil.
4. Grill or broil the sausages until they are cooked through and have a nice brown crust.
5. These sausages are great served on the barbecue.
Yoghurt Sauce:
1. Mix together 1 pint yoghurt, grated cucumber (after draining for an hour), crushed garlic cloves, juice of half a lemon, salt, freshly ground black pepper, and a pinch of cayenne pepper in a bowl.
2. Serve the yoghurt sauce with Cevapcici as a dip.
